raw_consumer_statement:
I live in a XXXX unit apartment building in XXXX XXXX XXXX, on XXXX XXXX, a major XXXX XXXX. I am disputing a charge for a package that was never received by me, a package of 5 items from XXXX XXXX. I have outlined the situation and provided documentation below. 

To access my building, you must buzz the apartment. My package was supposedly delivered on XX/XX/XXXX and I was home all day. 
-- No one ever buzzed on XX/XX/XXXX. 

The package was supposedly delivered at XXXX XXXX on XX/XX/XXXX. 
-- My super has checked the lobby cameras and he says no deliveries were made between XXXX and XXXX on XX/XX/XXXX. 
I am attaching a signed letter to this effect. 

The tracking for this package shows that the last location before it was supposedly delivered is " NA, NA. '' There is no additional scanning of this package for 3 days, between when it arrives in XXXX and when it is supposedly delivered in XXXX. -- This suggests that it was not actually scanned in XXXX XXXX XXXXXXXX. 

Finally, the tracking on the XXXX page says it was left with the " front door. '' -- Other packages that were successfully delivered by XXXX ( for example XXXX ) say they were left with the doorman. This further suggests that the package was left either outside the building, left at a different building, or never actually delivered. 

I have spent more than 30 minutes on the phone with XXXX XXXX, providing this all of this information, and was told my only recourse at this point is to file a dispute with my credit card company. 

I filed a dispute with my credit card company -- AmericanExpress -- and was told that because the delivery company says it was delivered, I have no recourse. As noted in this XXXX threads ( attached ), this is a known issue with XXXX -- packages are marked as delivered that are never actually delivered. 

I am attaching a signed letter from my building super noting that no packages were delivered ( based on his viewing of the camera data ), documentation of my order, the tracking discrepancies and a list of reddit comments noting that this is a know delivery problem with XXXX in XXXX. 

Best, XXXX XXXX
